description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a broad, low-pitched roof featuring multiple solar panels on top. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden siding, complemented by a large, partially covered front porch and a fenced-in yard area. Several windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, with some grouped together and others standing alone. The structure includes a prominent attached garage with a wide driveway, and landscaped planter boxes are visible near the entrances. The roof extends over the porch and garage, providing additional shelter and architectural interest. The overall design is modern yet warm, blending natural materials with functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story wooden bungalow with a low-pitched roof, solar panels, a large porch, and an attached garage, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped planters.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, large porch, attached garage, and solar panels on the roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive roof, back windows, and fenced backyard area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage, driveway, and additional windows, with the fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the back patio, grouped windows, and the full array of solar panels on the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
